name: video-template-frame-creative-voltage
title: Creative Voltage Frame
description: Electric split with hand-drawn script — offset panels slide in, display title rises with an outlined word, script strokes itself in.

description_i18n.en: Electric split with hand-drawn script — offset panels slide in, display title rises with an outlined word, script strokes itself in.
description_i18n.zh-CN: 创意电压分屏帧:电光蓝/暗错位分屏滑入 + 描边电光词 + 手写 script 自描, 复古现代有活力

query.en: Use the Creative Voltage Frame template to turn my title into an energetic split reveal — electric-blue and dark panels sliding in offset, a display title rising with one outlined electric word, and a handwritten script stroking itself in. Preserve the template's visual signature, use real content, and avoid lorem ipsum or placeholder images.
query.zh-CN: 用「创意电压分屏帧」模板把我的标题做成一段能量感分屏揭示:电光蓝与暗色面板错位滑入 + 标题升起带一个描边电光词 + 手写体自描入。保持模板的视觉签名,使用真实内容,避免 lorem ipsum 和占位图片。

origin.name: none (original preset by the L2 skill author)
origin.reference: No specific real-world studio; the 'Creative Voltage' look is an original preset composed by the frontend-slides author

provenance.transformation: Static slide preset → animated hyperframes timeline (offset panels slide in, display title rises with one electric outlined word, handwritten script strokes itself in over a swept underline) built as original CSS/SVG keyframes. Original sample data. No upstream source code copied verbatim.
